.wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion .block-editor-inner-blocks {
  width: 100%;
}
.wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion .block-editor-inner-blocks .block-editor-block-list__layout {
  width: 100%;
}
.wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion .wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion-item {
  height: 500px;
  min-width: 100px;
  width: 100px;
  background-color: #f0f2f5;
  padding: 10px 15px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  overflow: hidden;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion .wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion-item, .wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion .wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion-item * {
  transition-duration: 1s;
}
.wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion .wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion-item > .aahb_accordion_head {
  overflow: hidden;
}
.wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion .wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion-item > .aahb_accordion_head > .aahb_accordion_icon_wrapper {
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  color: #eee;
}
.wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion .wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion-item > .aahb_accordion_head > .aahb_accordion_icon_wrapper > .aahb_accordion_icon {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}
.wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion .wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion-item > .aahb_accordion_head > .aahb_accordion_icon_wrapper > .aahb_icon_upload {
  cursor: pointer;
  display: none;
}
.wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion .wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion-item > .aahb_accordion_head > .aahb_accordion_icon_wrapper:not(.frontend):hover {
  transition-duration: 0ms;
  background-color: #777;
}
.wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion .wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion-item > .aahb_accordion_head > .aahb_accordion_icon_wrapper:not(.frontend):hover > .aahb_accordion_icon {
  display: none;
}

  display: block;
}
.wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion .wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion-item > .aahb_accordion_head > .aahb_accordion_heading {
  opacity: 0;
  padding: 10px 0;
}
.wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion .wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion-item > .aahb_accordion_head > .aahb_accordion_heading .aahb_heading, .wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion .wp-block-aab-horizontal-accordion-item > .aahb_accordion_head > .aahb_accordion_heading .aahb_subheading {

  padding: 0;

  font-size: 16px;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

  width: 500px;
  filter: blur(5px);
  transition-duration: 100ms;
}

  border-radius: 10px;
}

  width: 100%;

}

}

/* GLOBAL CSS */
body{
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

table {
    width: 100%;
    background-color: #ffffff;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    border-width: 1px;
    border-color: #0c1e34;
    border-style: solid;
    color: #0c1e34;
}

table td,
  table.customTable th {
    border-width: 1px;
    border-color: #0c1e34;
    border-style: solid;
    padding: 6px;
    text-align: left;
}

table thead {
    background-color: #f9c001;
}

 font-size: 19px;
}

<script type='text/javascript'>
	document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const readMoreTrigger = document.querySelector('#show-more-toggle');
    readMoreTrigger.addEventListener('click', function(e){
        e.preventDefault();
        const postContent =  document.querySelector('#brxe-nmvelf');
        postContent.classList.toggle('post-content-hidden');
        if(postContent.classList.contains('post-content-hidden')){
            readMoreTrigger.innerText = 'Show more...'
        } else {
            readMoreTrigger.innerText = 'Show less...'
        }
    })
});
</script>

Get expert insights, in-depth reviews, and the best deals to make your home-buying journey seamless.</p><div id="brxe-bztrcu" class="brxe-block bricks-lazy-hidden"><a id="brxe-eoyeqj" class="brxe-text-link" href="https://www.propertygeek.in/bangalore-projects/">Bangalore</a><a id="brxe-jrsywv" class="brxe-text-link" href="https://www.propertygeek.in/hyderabad-projects/">Hyderabad</a></div></div></div></section><div id="brxe-nqvraz" class="brxe-template"><div id="brxe-67a204" class="brxe-container bricks-lazy-hidden"><div id="brxe-81f877" data-script-id="81f877" class="brxe-code"><div id="brxe-sroevv" class="brxe-search">
<form role="search" method="get" class="bricks-search-form" action="https://www.propertygeek.in">

<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script>
function setSearchQuery(){
    const searchParams = (new URL(window.location.href)).searchParams;

    const searchQuery = searchParams.get('s');
    const searchCity = searchParams.get('city');
    const searchBuilder = searchParams.get('builder');

    const searchForm = document.querySelector('.bricks-search-form .fields');
    const inputForm = searchForm.querySelector('input');
    if(searchQuery && inputForm){
        inputForm.value = searchQuery;
    }
    const inputCity = searchForm.querySelector('#search-input-city');
    const inputBuilder = searchForm.querySelector('#search-input-builder');

    if(inputCity && searchCity){
        inputCity.value = searchCity;
    }

    if(inputBuilder && searchBuilder){
        inputBuilder.value = searchBuilder;
    }
}
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
	setSearchQuery();
})
</script></div></div></div><section id="brxe-bxsbul" class="brxe-section bricks-lazy-hidden"><div id="brxe-qjmyht" class="brxe-container bricks-lazy-hidden"><div id="brxe-exwuqo" class="brxe-block bricks-lazy-hidden"><h2 id="brxe-onjxbr" class="brxe-heading">About Us</h2><div id="brxe-cripkp" class="brxe-text"><p>At Property Geek, we take away the worry of property owners like you and make house-hunting a beautiful experience. So, by keeping our finger on the beat of innovation, we gather every possible information that you would need to find your dream home — from villas to plots, from credible property listings to the legal aspects of owning or selling property in India, Property Geek has got you covered!</p>
<p>Our team of experienced, energetic, and creative professionals promises to provide a helping hand to you. We’re here to provide you with the best house so that you can turn it into your stunning dream home.</p>
</div></div><a id="brxe-acixbw" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uM-s_lTB64w" data-pswp-width="1280" data-pswp-height="720" data-pswp-video-url="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uM-s_lTB64w" class="brxe-block bricks-lightbox bricks-lazy-hidden"></a></div></section><section id="brxe-vcqsrz" class="brxe-section bricks-lazy-hidden"><div id="brxe-fbxrdy" class="brxe-container bricks-lazy-hidden"><div id="brxe-bdzytj" class="brxe-div bricks-lazy-hidden"><h2 id="brxe-thhxiq" class="brxe-heading">Latest Listed Properties<br></h2><div id="brxe-himcjl" class="brxe-block brx-grid bricks-lazy-hidden"><div class="brxe-zqrhsx brxe-block cs-block bricks-lazy-hidden"><div class="brxe-pnfqvt brxe-block bricks-lazy-hidden"><figure class="brxe-nsnlvn brxe-image cs-block-image tag"><img width="768" height="432" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20768%20432&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="css-filter size-medium_large bricks-lazy-hidden" alt="Whitefield Bangalore Overview: Map Location, Property Rates, Projects, Photos, Reviews" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.propertygeek.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Whitefield-Bangalore-Overview-768x432.webp" data-type="string" data-sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 768px" /></figure><div class="brxe-qivgxy brxe-block cs-block-content bricks-lazy-hidden"><a class="brxe-dpblne brxe-text-link" href="https://www.propertygeek.in/category/whitefield/">Whitefield</a><h4 class="brxe-bdqyzo brxe-heading cs-block-title"><a href="https://www.propertygeek.in/whitefield-bangalore-overview/">Whitefield Bangalore Overview: Map Location, Property Rates, Projects, Photos, Reviews</a></h4><div class="brxe-ghuydb brxe-text-basic">If there’s one part of East Bangalore that has truly grown up, it’s Whitefield....</div></div></div></div><div class="brxe-zqrhsx brxe-block cs-block bricks-lazy-hidden"><div class="brxe-pnfqvt brxe-block bricks-lazy-hidden"><div class="brxe-qivgxy brxe-block cs-block-content bricks-lazy-hidden"><a class="brxe-dpblne brxe-text-link" href="https://www.propertygeek.in/category/uncategorized/">Uncategorized</a><h4 class="brxe-bdqyzo brxe-heading cs-block-title"><a href="https://www.propertygeek.in/yelahanka-new-town-bangalore/">Yelahanka New Town, Bangalore: Map Location, Pincode, Pros &amp; Cons, Reviews</a></h4><div class="brxe-ghuydb brxe-text-basic">If
